instructions: Review entries, then set include_on_site to true. Run: python scripts/generate_html.py

vulnerabilities.title: WebPros cPanel & WHM and WP2 (WordPress Squared)
vulnerabilities.name: WebPros cPanel & WHM and WP2 (WordPress Squared) Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: WebPros cPanel & WHM (WebHost Manager) and WP2 (WordPress Squared) contain an authentication bypass vulnerability in the login flow that allows unauthenticated remote attackers to gain unauthorized access to the control panel.
vulnerabilities.short_description: WebPros cPanel & WHM (WebHost Manager) and WP2 (WordPress Squared) contain an authentication bypass vulnerability in...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.

vulnerabilities.title: Linux Kernel
vulnerabilities.name: Linux Kernel Incorrect Resource Transfer Between Spheres Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Linux Kernel contains an incorrect resource transfer between spheres vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation.
